entries.source: Chat Edit: 'the code editor doesnt show the text written in it The IDE doesnt have a working code editor, it doesnt load properly when writing or attempting to open files it goes grey/black and the typed letters or code opened matches teh background also no the marketplace doesnt load properly, maybe you can make a way to log it as its launched to get the actual error and fix it and maybe do that to the entire IDE to see what is  and isnt working all the chat boxes where front end users can type are the same way the text and background all area grey'
